classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

title: Canon LXXXVIII.

verses.text: But in the case of Maximian of Vagai it seemed good that letters be sent from the council both to him and to his people; that he should vacate the bishoprick, and that they should request another to be appointed for them.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Let Maximian of Bagai be expelled from his church, and another be set in his room.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This canon is remaining part of Canon ij., of the Synod of Milevis, a.d.
